comment: SPSA example. NOTE: crop's objective is bimodal (O(1-3) when feasible, +1e6 per containment violation), and SPSA's gradient estimate is dominated by those penalty cliffs, so it is a POOR fit here vs cmaes/coordinate_descent (which are rank/line-search based). Kept as a runnable example; if you use it, watch the per-iteration curve and tune `a` to the feasible-region scale (start from the --method none baseline).
